prose:
**Total electronic energy of water (H₂O)** — geometry optimization with **GFN2-xTB** (xtb v21), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1.  
Geometry provenance: started from user-supplied `/…/water.xyz`; optimized with the xtb-embedded ASE BFGS optimizer (target max force 0.05 eV Å⁻¹) and converged in 3 steps.  
Solvent model: none (explicit gas phase).  
Backend software: xtb v21 (GFN2-xTB Hamiltonian).  
SCF and optimization both reported `converged: true`; no warnings were raised.  
Live log was written during the run to `opt_20260624-114817.out` alongside the input file; the optimized geometry is saved at `/…/water_xtb_opt.xyz`.

Headline result (energy of the optimized structure): -137.97654 eV
